chapter_title.en: Chapter on What is Permissible and Impermissible for the Muhrim to Do and Use of All Types

text: 2706 - وَ سَأَلَ يَعْقُوبُ بْنُ شُعَيْبٍ أَبَا عَبْدِ اَللَّهِ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ : عَنِ اَلْمُحْرِمِ يَغْتَسِلُ فَقَالَ «نَعَمْ وَ يُفِيضُ اَلْمَاءَ عَلَى رَأْسِهِ وَ لاَ يَدْلُكُهُ ».

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.2706 - Ya'qub ibn Shu'ayb asked Abu Abdullah (as) about a person in the state of ihram taking a bath.
Imam (as) said: "Yes, they may pour water over their head, but they should not scrub it."
